driver_subject: vfs: Convert ibmasmfs to use the new mount API
stage1_reason: Driver converted from old mount API to new mount API as documented in commit message and diff shows replacement of mount() with init_fs_context() and addition of fs_context structures
stage2_reason: Driver commit explicitly converts to new mount API using get_tree_single() helper introduced in kernel commit c23a0bbab30c, which provides the convenience helper get_tree_single() referenced in driver migration.
